title: Japan och Sydkorea rusar: "Alla undrar när ljuset kommer släckas"

# Japan och Sydkorea rusar: "Alla undrar när ljuset kommer släckas"

**Feed**: dagen-med-di  
**Published**: 2026-05-28  
**Market Sentiment**: Positive

⏱️ **Time Horizon Key**: ST = <3 months | MT = 3-12 months | LT = >12 months

---

## Episode Thesis

The episode discusses the red-hot Asian equity markets, with South Korea's Kospi up ~100% this year and strong gains in Japan's Nikkei and Taiwan, driven largely by the AI/semiconductor boom since most chip and AI-memory hardware is manufactured in Japan, South Korea, and Taiwan. Japan's rally is attributed less to AI and more to improved corporate governance, a shift from deflation to mild inflation, and renewed interest in traditional trading houses (helped by Warren Buffett's investments). The mood is broadly bullish on Asian markets, though hosts note uncertainty about how long the rally can last.

---

## Recommendations

_No signals for universe stocks in this episode._
